Here are some examples: File and document management Organize files: "Organize my Downloads folder by type and date" — Claude can sort hundreds of files into categorized folders. Research and analysis Research synthesis: Combine information from web searches, articles, papers, and notes into coherent reports or summaries. Transcript analysis: Extract themes, key points, and action items from meeting notes, interviews, or lecture recordings. Personal knowledge synthesis: Analyze your notes, journals, or research files to surface patterns, themes, and connections you might have missed. Document creation Spreadsheets with formulas: Generate Excel files with working VLOOKUP, conditional formatting, and multiple tabs—not just CSVs that need fixing. Presentations: Create slide decks from rough notes or meeting transcripts. Presentations: Create slide decks from rough notes or meeting transcripts. Reports from messy inputs: Turn voice memos and scattered notes into polished documents. Reports from messy inputs: Turn voice memos and scattered notes into polished documents. Data and analysis Statistical analysis: Outlier detection, cross-tabulation, and time-series analysis on your data files. Statistical analysis: Outlier detection, cross-tabulation, and time-series analysis on your data files. Data visualization: Generate charts using your data. Data visualization: Generate charts using your data. Data transformation: Clean, transform, and process datasets. Data transformation: Clean, transform, and process datasets. Permissions and security Cowork runs with layered protections on your computer: Code execution isolation: Shell commands and code Claude writes run inside an isolated virtual machine (VM), separate from your main operating system.
